channel.title: Pages on michaelmackinnon.io
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on michaelmackinnon.io

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m a backend engineer focused on application security and system resilience.

I care about failure modes, blast radius, and how small decisions turn into large security problems. My background includes security tooling, cloud infrastructure, and building internal systems in constrained, real-world environments.

This site is a working notebook. I use it to publish security experiments, AWS hardening notes, and practical breakdowns of how systems fail and how to make them harder to misuse.
